must.text: manifest.json present under adapters/<slug>/ with slug/title/kind/status/maintainer
Does not fork Exchange state machine or invent Record API
Signing stays local (SDK/Adopter/pair_cli); no cloud custody of private keys
settlement_note honest: mock | sandbox | licensed partner
Device run-states are not written as Exchange state

should.text: Unit or demo command documented in adapters/<slug>/README.md
Uses ProviderAdapter or surfaces.dispatch or documented pair_cli
